ANY ISSUES THAT ARISE ARE TO BE ATTEMPTED TO BE WORKED OUT INFORMALLY IN GOOD FAITH BETWEEN THE PARTIES, AND IF THAT FAILS, 24 HRS NOTICE TO JUDGE KAHN BY PHONE OR EMAIL. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING.
